title: rhododendron ellipticum var. leptosanthum
intro: Rhododendron ellipticum var. leptosanthum is a lesser-known variety of the western azalea, a flowering plant native to the western regions of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Rhododendron ellipticum var. leptosanthum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be made into a tincture or salve for topical application.
